title: Work with Us
description: Information on how to work in various ways with Ames Laboratory
text: Ames National Laboratory welcomes collaboration with industry, academia, and other organizations. As a federally funded facility, Ames Lab has scientific and technical capabilities in areas that support key national missions and are critical to the continued growth of U.S. industries and services. Collaborations between partners and Ames Lab can help both parties meet common technical objectives while reducing development risks and leveraging resources.
